response.justification: Candidate is an experienced full-stack developer with strong testing and craftsmanship background, but the role demands 8 years of C++ and 5 years of large-scale distributed systems/cloud compute platform work. His C++ exposure is limited to a ~6-month stint at National Instruments in 2014-2015, and his core stack is JavaScript/TypeScript and DLang. No evidence of cloud compute platform leadership or distributed systems at the scale required.
strengths: Long, diverse engineering career with craftsmanship focus (TDD, CI/CD, pairing)
Some mentoring/teaching experience via workshops, dojos, and Selenium courses
Exposure to high-throughput systems at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic (millions of req/s, though in DLang)
concerns: Far below the 8-year C++ requirement — only ~6 months of C/C++ at NI a decade ago
No demonstrated cloud compute platform or large-scale distributed infrastructure leadership
No formal technical leadership role mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers at the required scope

key_factors.factor: Lacks cloud compute platform / distributed systems scale
Strong software craftsmanship and mentoring foundation
